---
title: "The Crosswalk"
subtitle: "Field notes from the intersections of biology, data, statistics and curiosity."
---

The Crosswalk is the thinking layer of Lunaland.

These short posts connect technical work to interpretation, uncertainty and communication.

## Posts

### [Example Post](example-post.qmd)

A short field note about how small data decisions can shape biological interpretation.

**Related concepts:** uncertainty, interpretation, reproducibility  
**Related projects:** RNA-seq Workflow Demo  
**Related pitfalls:** Wrong Genome Build

---

## Categories

- Evidence & Uncertainty
- Bioinformatics Pitfalls
- Visual Statistics
- Cross-Discipline Curiosity
- Scientific Communication
